rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow users to register.
The system shall allow authorized users to login.
The system shall enable users to upload documents in various file formats.
The system shall display user profile information from the database.

source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A Registration module allows the users to register
Login module that allows the authorized users

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Enable users to upload documents in various file formats
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: An Upload Document module allows the users to upload documents such as driving licence, vehicle registration, academic mark sheet and other relevant documents in various file formats.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Display user profile information from database
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A Profile module displays the complete profile of the user as available in the database
